case_title: DUNBAR, MELANIE et al VS AMIT KAPADIYA (EMIT ANANT KAPADIYA)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNBAR, MELANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMIT KAPADIYA (EMIT ANANT KAPADIYA) $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00, PLAINTIFF MELANIE DUNBAR DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE TO PROCEED IN ACTION NO.822867. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AMIT KAPADIYA (EMIT ANANT KAPADIYA) IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFENDANT WAS DEFECTIVE. CONTINUED TO APRIL 11, 2008 @ 10AM FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARNER, SILENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMIT KAPADIYA (EMIT ANANT KAPADIYA) $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00, THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 12/04/07 IS CORRECTED TO STATE THAT DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF SILENA GARNER $2500.00, PLUS $75.00 COSTS.
